content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於5月27日20:00進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年6月10日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
● 修復了拉蒙娜切換形態時打斷動畫會導致切換形態按鈕異常的問題。
● 修復了喚醒體「塔薇」試玩關卡中釋放狂氣爆發無法獲取卡牌的問題。
● 修復了喚醒體「拉蒙娜」啟靈3釋放鑰令後獲得的暴擊率為永久暴擊率的問題。
● 修復了「異動海潮」挑戰界面上「星辰篇」的文字消失的問題。
● 修復了「窺覷神國的陰影：異動海潮」中等級修正提示存在錯誤文本的問題
● 修復了戰鬥結算界面，沒有顯示角色皮膚的問題。
● 修復了好友界面，助戰角色未顯示立繪問題。
● 修復了新手抽卡教程中，可能意外卡住的問題。
● 修復了「窺覷神國的陰影：異動海潮」第三關「永恒寄主」召喚「水之子」位置錯誤的問題。
● 修復了克萊門汀、克珀珊特部分角色語音錯位的問題
● 修復了主界面福利入口輪播圖無法正確播放的問題。
● 修復了主界面喚醒入口輪播圖拉伸變形的問題。
● 修復了主界面福利入口在未解鎖狀態下圖片顯示錯誤的問題。
● 修復了「設置-系統」內「戰鬥」文本丟失的問題
● 下架「精選禮盒」中的「調查補給」。

V2.2.2.1 Online Maintenance Notice
Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on May 27 at 20:00(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on June 10 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
● Fixed an issue where switching Ramona's form would interrupt the animation and cause the form-switching button to behave abnormally. 
● Fixed an issue where Awakener "Tawil" in the Trial Stage could not obtain cards after releasing Exalt. 
● Fixed an issue where "Ramona" as an Awakener gained permanent Critical Rate instead of temporary when using Enlightenment 3 to release Posse. 
● Fixed an issue where the text for "Astral Reign" disappeared on the "Bleak Tide" Challenge interface. 
● Fixed an issue with incorrect text in the level adjustment hint in "Glimpse Beyond Sanctum: Bleak Tide." 
● Fixed an issue where character skins were not displayed in the battle result interface. 
● Fixed an issue where the combat assist characters did not display their illustrations in the Friends interface. 
● Fixed an issue where the new player card-drawing tutorial might get stuck unexpectedly. 
● Fixed an issue where the position of "Child of Water" summoned in the third stage "Eternal Host" of "Glimpse Beyond Sanctum: Bleak Tide" was incorrect. 
● Fixed an issue where Clementine and Corposant had misaligned voice lines. 
● Fixed an issue where the carousel image in the main menu's Awaken entry could not play correctly. 
● Fixed an issue where the carousel image in the main menu's Awaken section was stretched and distorted. 
● Fixed an issue where the image in the main menu's Goods entry displayed incorrectly when it was not unlocked. 
● Fixed an issue where the "Battle" text was missing in "Settings - System." 
● Removed "Investigate Supplies" from the "Selected Gift Box."
